{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322043143FAE37F5C55FD94EE678F"}"},"total":97},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7598517104319234878","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"特别好，特别喜欢，截聊仙同看西游，经常出现的那几个性格鲜明，特别有意思，作者加油，不要听不要看那些差评，差评都是嫉妒你，喜欢你的多的是，希望作者大大可以长长久久的更新下去，很精彩，这本写完了再写一本巫妖量劫前后三清同看封神，很期待，作者大大加油加油！！！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1769171842,"group_id":"7539495460671589400","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4f9otgZ+yy6an4o+ASnGTA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776700848&x-signature=IqKiHTwWvdI9JXrGcbswfncov9s%3D","user_id":"99255184867","user_name":"🌹((半夏微凉))🌹"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"99255184867","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539495460671589400","book_info":{"abstract":"【洪荒背景+名场面+天幕开局+群像+西游+封神+西游记后传】
（许多设定可能与各位读者老爷所了解的不太一样，大多后期会圆回来，请勿见怪）
什么，多宝是叛徒？
什么？长耳定光仙也是叛徒？
等等，我通天哪去了？我的弟子怎么都在天庭任职？
三清共签封神榜，通天返回碧游宫后，一道光幕悄然出现在空中....
光幕内。
石破天惊，一只猴子腾空出世...
